# FastCAC

> Registered, branded, and online in 7 business days. FastCAC is a premium, all-in-one service for entrepreneurs in Nigeria to launch their business with an official CAC certificate, professional logo, and custom website.
> See [Full Documentation](https://fastcac.com/llms-full.txt) for more details.

## Core Services

- [Business Registration](https://fastcac.com/) - Official CAC registration (BN or Ltd) with TIN generated automatically.
- [Ready-to-Use Business Names](https://fastcac.com/names) - Curated list of available names with matching domains.
- [Full Branding & Tech Stack](https://fastcac.com/#whats-included) - Professional logos, brand kits, websites, and business emails included.

## Expert Guides (Blog)

- [How to Choose a Great Business Name](https://fastcac.com/blog/how-to-choose-a-business-name) - Modern naming strategies for Nigerian startups.
- [CAC Registration Guide](https://fastcac.com/blog/cac-registration-guide) - Complete 2026 guide to CAC registration, TIN, and digital certificates.
